nodes.name: 翠鸟亚科
nodes.summary: 翠鸟亚科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括White-bellied kingfisher、冠翠鸟、Half-collared kingfisher等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-bellied kingfisher
nodes.summary: White-bellied kingfisher（White-bellied kingfisher，学名 Corythornis leucogaster），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Louis Fraser、翠鸟亚科，常见栖息地包括热带雨林。

nodes.name: Louis Fraser
nodes.summary: Louis Fraser (1810 – 1866) was a British zoologist and collector.

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-bellied kingfisher (Corythornis leucogaster) is a species of kingfisher in the subfamily Alcedininae that occurs in Mali and throughout the African tropical rainforest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-bellied kingfisher (Corythornis leucogaster) is a species of kingfisher in the subfamily Alcedininae that occurs in Mali and throughout the African tropical rainforest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The white-bellied kingfisher (Corythornis leucogaster) is a species of kingfisher in the subfamily Alcedininae that occurs in Mali and throughout the African tropical rainforest
